prompt: Set up a processor that sends Kafka events to AWS Lambda function for processing asynchronously

assertions.name: externalFunction_execution_async
assertions.reason: When $externalFunction is the final sink stage, execution MUST be 'async'. Only mid-pipeline $externalFunction can use 'sync'.

assertions.name: externalFunction_has_as_field
assertions.description: $externalFunction.as is specified (field name for Lambda response)

assertions.name: externalFunction_is_terminal_stage
assertions.description: $externalFunction is the last pipeline stage (async sink)
assertions.note: For this test, Lambda is used as a sink. It can also be used mid-pipeline for enrichment with execution='sync' or 'async'

assertions.name: mentions_aws_prerequisites
assertions.description: Response mentions IAM role ARN must be registered via Atlas Cloud Provider Access

common_mistakes.error: Invalid configuration - sink must use async execution
common_mistakes.fix: Use execution='async' when $externalFunction is the last stage
